name: Клятвопреступник
description: An Oathbreaker is a Paladin who breaks their sacred oaths to pursue some dark ambition or serve an evil power. Whatever light burned in the Paladin's heart has been extinguished. Only darkness remains. A Paladin must be evil and at least 3rd level to become an Oathbreaker.

features.name: Oathbreaker Spells
features.description: An Oathbreaker loses previously gained oath spells and instead gains the following Oathbreaker spells at the Paladin levels listed.

features.name: Control Undead
features.description: As an action, you target one Undead creature you can see within 30 feet of you. The target must make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the target must obey your commands for the next 24 hours, or until you use this Channel Divinity option again. An Undead whose {@variantrule Challenge Rating|XPHB} is equal to or greater than your Paladin level is immune to this effect.

features.name: Dreadful Aspect
features.description: As an action, you channel the darkest emotions and focus them into a burst of magical menace. Each creature of your choice within 30 feet of you must make a Wisdom saving throw if it can see you. On a failed save, the target has the {@condition Frightened|XPHB} condition for 1 minute. If a creature {@condition Frightened|XPHB} by this feature ends its turn more than 30 feet away from you, it can attempt another Wisdom saving throw to end the effect on it.

features.name: Aura of Hate
features.description: You and any Fiends and Undead within your Aura of Protection gain a bonus to melee weapon damage rolls equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum of +1). A creature can benefit from this feature from only one Paladin at a time.

features.name: Supernatural Resistance
features.description: You gain {@variantrule Resistance|XPHB} to Bludgeoning, Piercing, and Slashing damage from nonmagical weapons.

features.name: Dread Lord
features.description: As an action, you can surround yourself with an aura of gloom that lasts for 1 minute. The aura reduces any {@variantrule Bright Light|XPHB} in a 30-foot radius around you to {@variantrule Dim Light|XPHB}. Whenever an enemy that is {@condition Frightened|XPHB} by you starts its turn in the aura, it takes {@damage 4d10} Psychic damage. Additionally, you and any creatures of your choosing in the aura are draped in deeper shadow. Creatures that rely on sight have {@variantrule Disadvantage|XPHB} on attack rolls against creatures draped in this shadow. While the aura lasts, you can use a {@action Bonus Action|XPHB} on your turn to cause the shadows in the aura to attack one creature. Make a melee spell attack against the target. If the attack hits, the target takes Necrotic damage equal to {@damage 3d10} plus your Charisma modifier. Once you use this feature, you can't use it again until you finish a {@variantrule Long Rest|XPHB}.
